reviews.comment:
Todo todo lo q necesitas para el viaje y mas... Parada obligatoria

(Translated by Google)
Everything you need for your trip and more... A must-stop
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRb3Itdk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio muy bien atendida, con Buenos baños y un predio muy amplio con mesas y bancos muy cómodo para descansar en medio de un viaje y tomar unos mates bajo la sombra de un árbol.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very well-run service station, with good restrooms and a very spacious area with tables and benches, very comfortable for resting during a trip and having some mate under the shade of a tree.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRem9Lb29nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligada en mi viaje, porque tiene todo. Los baños siempre están re limpios y hay personal siempre para mantenerlos así, tiene pelotero y juegos para los nenes en muy buen estado, plaza, parrilla (muy buena, por cierto), café, kiosco, cargo combustible, aire, agua para el mate, todo. Justo a mitad de camino a Mardel, es ideal. La mejor parada lejos!

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop on my trip because it has everything. The restrooms are always spotless and there's always staff to keep them that way. It has a ball pit and playground equipment for kids in great condition, a plaza, a grill (very good, by the way), a café, a kiosk, gas, air conditioning, hot water for mate—everything. Right in the middle of the road to Mar del Plata, it's ideal. By far the best stop!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbHJxMl9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Luego de horas de viaje este es un oasis donde hay de todo para renovar fuerzas para continuar. Me encanta, limpio y muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
After hours of travel, this is an oasis where you can find everything you need to recharge your batteries. I love it; it's clean and very pleasant.

reviews.comment:
Super cómodo, tiene un parque con mesas y sillas para descansar. Árboles con sombra y bastante limpio por la concurrencia en enero

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable, it has a park with tables and chairs for relaxing. Shady trees and quite clean despite the number of visitors in January.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBM1pMNU9BEAE

reviews.comment: Must do: get some cheese and salami form the local producers, you can find some shops right by the gas station (only during the day).
